scripts.render:web-build: npx pnpm@10.26.1 install --frozen-lockfile --prod=false && npx pnpm@10.26.1 --filter @cater-sklad/shared build && npx pnpm@10.26.1 --filter @cater-sklad/web build
scripts.render:api-build: npx pnpm@10.26.1 install --frozen-lockfile --prod=false --ignore-scripts=false && npx pnpm@10.26.1 --filter @cater-sklad/api prisma generate && npx pnpm@10.26.1 --filter @cater-sklad/api prisma migrate deploy && npx pnpm@10.26.1 --filter @cater-sklad/api prisma db seed && npx pnpm@10.26.1 --filter @cater-sklad/api build
